summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Admin panel fixes for Addrika e-commerce platform. All features working correctly: Admin login, Orders tab with Purge All button, Restore Order, Force Delete, and Purge All Orders with confirmation modal. Made with Emergent badge is hidden.

1_admin_login.details: Admin login works with email contact.us@centraders.com and PIN 110078. Shows 'Admin login successful!' toast.

2_orders_tab_navigation.details: Orders tab displays correctly. Shows 'No orders found' when empty, displays orders in table when present.

3_purge_all_button_visibility.details: Purge All button (data-testid='purge-all-orders-btn') appears only when orders exist. Hidden when no orders.

4_restore_order.details: Restore Order tab works correctly. Form allows creating test orders. Shows 'Order TEST-ORDER-001 restored successfully!' toast.

5_force_delete_order.details: Force Delete button (trash icon, orange color) available for non-cancelled orders. API returns forced=true.

6_purge_all_modal.details: Purge All Orders modal shows danger warning, requires typing 'PURGE_ALL_ORDERS' to confirm. Modal has proper data-testid attributes.

7_purge_all_execution.details: After typing confirmation and clicking button, all orders are purged. Shows 'Purged N orders successfully!' toast.

8_emergent_badge_hidden.details: Made with Emergent badge (#emergent-badge) exists in DOM but is hidden with display:none via CSS in index.css lines 200-210.

backend_api_tests.test_get_orders: PASSED - Returns orders array and total count
backend_api_tests.test_restore_order: PASSED - Creates order and returns order_number and id
backend_api_tests.test_delete_order_force: PASSED - Returns forced=true for force delete

critical_code_review_comments: Route ordering in admin.py is correct - /orders/purge/all (line 323) comes BEFORE /orders/{order_id} (line 352) to avoid FastAPI path matching issues
CSS in index.css properly hides Emergent badge using multiple selectors for robustness
seed_data_creation: Created test orders via Restore Order form and API for testing purposes (all purged after testing)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin panel order management is fully functional. Database is currently empty (all orders were purged during testing). Admin credentials: email=contact.us@centraders.com, PIN=110078. Purge All button only shows when orders exist. Force Delete available for any order status.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - All features working as expected. The previous issue with route matching was fixed by ordering /orders/purge/all before /orders/{order_id} in admin.py router.
